label: Speakers Section
content: {"title":"They've spoken at our events","speakers":[{"name":"Jenny Wilson","slug":"jenny-wilson","title":"CEO, Genetech","company":"Genetech","image":"Jenny.jpg","bannerImage":"Jenny_Wilson.png","location":"San Francisco, USA","shortBio":"Dr. Jenny Wilson is a visionary leader in biotechnology and genetic research. She has over 20 years of experience in driving innovation and building sustainable solutions for global healthcare challenges.","fullBio":"Dr. Jenny Wilson is the CEO of Genetech and a globally recognized expert in biotechnology and genetic engineering. Her work focuses on developing innovative therapies and sustainable solutions that improve lives. She is passionate about mentoring the next generation of scientists and advocating for diversity in STEM.","expertise":["Biotechnology","Innovation","Leadership","Healthcare"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"120+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"15+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"20+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Marvin McKinney","slug":"marvin-mckinney","title":"Director of Research, BioLabs","company":"BioLabs","image":"Marvin.jpg","bannerImage":"Marvin_McKinney.png","location":"Boston, USA","shortBio":"Dr. Marvin McKinney is a pioneering researcher in advanced materials and nanotechnology. His groundbreaking work has led to major advancements in material science applications across industries.","fullBio":"Dr. Marvin McKinney serves as Director of Research at BioLabs, where he leads teams focused on advanced materials and their applications in medicine and industry. With a career spanning over 18 years, he has authored more than 90 research papers and holds numerous patents in nanotechnology.","expertise":["Nanotechnology","Materials Science","Research","Patents"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"90+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"22+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"18+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Brooklyn Simmons","slug":"brooklyn-simmons","title":"Head of Innovation, TechVista","company":"TechVista","image":"Brooklyn.png","bannerImage":"Brooklyn_Simmons.png","location":"London, UK","shortBio":"Dr. Brooklyn Simmons leads innovation at TechVista, specializing in sustainable technology and green energy solutions. Her work bridges the gap between research and real-world applications.","fullBio":"Dr. Brooklyn Simmons is the Head of Innovation at TechVista, a global leader in sustainable technology. She has dedicated her career to advancing green energy solutions and creating environmentally responsible technologies. Her research has been recognized by multiple international bodies for its impact on climate science.","expertise":["Sustainability","Green Energy","Innovation","Climate Science"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"75+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"18+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"15+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Jacob Jones","slug":"jacob-jones","title":"CTO, NanoSphere","company":"NanoSphere","image":"Jacob.png","bannerImage":"Jacob_Jones.png","location":"Berlin, Germany","shortBio":"Jacob Jones is a technology visionary with expertise in quantum computing and advanced materials. As CTO of NanoSphere, he leads the development of next-generation computing solutions.","fullBio":"Jacob Jones serves as CTO of NanoSphere, where he oversees the development of quantum computing technologies and advanced material applications. His innovative approach to merging hardware and software has resulted in breakthrough products used across the tech industry. He holds a PhD in Computational Physics from MIT.","expertise":["Quantum Computing","Hardware","AI Systems","Physics"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"65+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"12+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"16+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Jerome Bell","slug":"jerome-bell","title":"VP Engineering, MedTech Global","company":"MedTech Global","image":"Jerome.png","bannerImage":"Jerome_Bell.png","location":"Tokyo, Japan","shortBio":"Jerome Bell is a globally acclaimed engineer specializing in medical devices and biomedical engineering. His innovations have improved healthcare delivery systems across three continents.","fullBio":"Jerome Bell is the VP of Engineering at MedTech Global, where he spearheads the development of cutting-edge medical devices and diagnostic tools. With expertise spanning biomedical engineering and regulatory compliance, he has successfully launched over 30 medical devices into global markets. He is a Fellow of the IEEE and a frequent keynote speaker at international conferences.","expertise":["Biomedical Eng.","Medical Devices","Diagnostics","Regulatory"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"85+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"25+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"22+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Esther Howard","slug":"esther-howard","title":"Principal Scientist, Pharma+","company":"Pharma+","image":"Jenny.jpg","bannerImage":"Esther_Howard.png","location":"Zurich, Switzerland","shortBio":"Dr. Esther Howard is a leading pharmaceutical scientist focusing on drug discovery and personalized medicine. Her research has contributed to several breakthrough therapies.","fullBio":"Dr. Esther Howard is the Principal Scientist at Pharma+, specializing in drug discovery and personalized medicine. She has been instrumental in developing targeted therapies that have significantly improved patient outcomes. Her work at the intersection of genomics and pharmacology has earned her numerous accolades in the field.","expertise":["Drug Discovery","Pharmacology","Genomics","Clinical Trials"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"110+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"20+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"19+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Cameron Williams","slug":"cameron-williams","title":"Lead Researcher, CERN","company":"CERN","image":"Marvin.jpg","bannerImage":"Cameron_Williams.png","location":"Geneva, Switzerland","shortBio":"Dr. Cameron Williams is a particle physicist at CERN, contributing to major discoveries in fundamental physics and high-energy particle research.","fullBio":"Dr. Cameron Williams is a Lead Researcher at CERN, working on high-energy particle physics experiments. His contributions to the Large Hadron Collider project have been pivotal in advancing our understanding of the fundamental building blocks of matter. He has published extensively in top-tier physics journals.","expertise":["Particle Physics","High-Energy","LHC Research","Data Science"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"95+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"14+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"17+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Savannah Nguyen","slug":"savannah-nguyen","title":"Director, AI Research Lab","company":"AI Research Lab","image":"Brooklyn.png","bannerImage":"Savannah_Nguyen.png","location":"Singapore","shortBio":"Dr. Savannah Nguyen directs cutting-edge artificial intelligence research, with a focus on machine learning applications in materials science and healthcare diagnostics.","fullBio":"Dr. Savannah Nguyen is the Director of AI Research Lab in Singapore, where she leads pioneering work in applying artificial intelligence to materials science and healthcare. Her innovative algorithms have been adopted by leading pharmaceutical companies for drug discovery and materials design optimization.","expertise":["AI / ML","Deep Learning","Healthcare AI","Materials Design"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"80+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"16+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"12+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Robert Fox","slug":"robert-fox","title":"Professor, Stanford University","company":"Stanford University","image":"Jacob.png","bannerImage":"Robert_Fox.png","location":"Stanford, USA","shortBio":"Prof. Robert Fox is a distinguished professor of materials engineering at Stanford University. His academic work has influenced generations of researchers in the field of advanced materials.","fullBio":"Prof. Robert Fox holds a distinguished professorship in Materials Engineering at Stanford University. His research group focuses on the synthesis and characterization of novel materials for energy storage and conversion. He has mentored over 50 PhD students and received the National Science Foundation's highest honor for his contributions to materials science education.","expertise":["Materials Eng.","Energy Storage","Education","Synthesis"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"150+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"30+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"25+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"},{"name":"Courtney Henry","slug":"courtney-henry","title":"Founder, GreenMat Labs","company":"GreenMat Labs","image":"Jerome.png","bannerImage":"Courtney_Henry.png","location":"Melbourne, Australia","shortBio":"Courtney Henry founded GreenMat Labs to develop eco-friendly materials for construction and manufacturing. His work has earned multiple sustainability awards.","fullBio":"Courtney Henry is the Founder and CEO of GreenMat Labs, an innovative startup focused on developing sustainable and eco-friendly materials for the construction and manufacturing industries. His patented materials have been adopted by major corporations looking to reduce their environmental footprint. He is a vocal advocate for green innovation and circular economy principles.","expertise":["Green Materials","Sustainability","Manufacturing","Circular Economy"],"stats":[{"icon":"papers","number":"55+","label":"Research Papers"},{"icon":"keynotes","number":"10+","label":"Keynotes"},{"icon":"experience","number":"14+","label":"Years Experience"}],"ctaText":"Register Now","ctaLink":"#register"}]}

label: About Hero
content: {"title":"About Organization","description":"Dr. Jenny Wilson is the CEO of Genetech and a globally recognized expert in biotechnology and genetic engineering. Her work focuses on developing innovative therapies and sustainable solutions that improve lives. She is passionate about mentoring the next generation of scientists and advocating for diversity in STEM.","image":"/uploads/about/aboutHero/1780922154757-About-Organization.png"}

label: Awards Hero Banner
content: {"subtitle":"HONORING EXCELLENCE","title":"Fellows & Awards","description":"Celebrating the luminaries of global research. Our fellowship program recognizes outstanding contributions to science, humanities, and technology, fostering a community of unparalleled intellectual leadership."}

label: FIAAM Introduction
content: {"title":"Fellow of IAAM (FIAAM)","description":"The title 'Fellow of IAAM' is a prestigious honor conferred upon eminent researchers who have demonstrated significant impact in the field of materials science. Those honored are entitled to use the designatory letters 'FIAAM'.","image":"/uploads/fellow-awards/trophy.jpg","quoteText":"Being a FIAAM is a testament to a lifelong commitment to scientific excellence and global innovation.","criteriaList":[{"title":"Eligibility Criteria","description":"Open to world-class scientists with a minimum of 15 years of professional experience in advanced materials research."},{"title":"Impact & Leadership","description":"Candidates must demonstrate sustained scientific leadership, innovation, and global outreach in sustainable energy solutions."}]}

label: Awards Categories Grid
content: {"title":"IAAM Awards Categories","description":"Diverse categories designed to recognize excellence at every stage of the scientific journey.","categories":[{"badge":"PREMIUM DISTINCTION","title":"Advanced Materials Laureate","description":"IAAM's highest honor awarded to individuals for their seminal and lasting contributions to the advancement of materials science and technology globally.","theme":"dark-blue"},{"badge":"RESEARCHER AWARD","title":"Researcher of the Year","description":"Celebrating outstanding researchers who have published high-impact work within the last 3 calendar years.","theme":"purple"},{"badge":"SCIENTIST AWARD","title":"Scientist Award","description":"For mid-career scientists demonstrating exceptional research leadership and innovation.","theme":"white"},{"badge":"YOUNG SCIENTIST MEDAL","title":"Young Scientist Medal","description":"Encouraging early-career researchers under the age of 35 for their promising initial work.","theme":"white-2"},{"badge":"INNOVATION AWARD","title":"Innovation Award","description":"Focusing on researchers who bridge the gap between academic discovery and industrial application.","theme":"light-orange"}]}

label: Indexed Publications Grid
content: {"title":"Indexed Publications","description":"Disseminating groundbreaking research through globally recognized and indexed academic channels.","items":[{"title":"Congress Proceedings","description":"All accepted abstracts and papers are published with ISBN and DOI indexing, and submitted for Scopus evaluation.","linkText":"View Guidelines","linkUrl":"/congress-proceedings"},{"title":"Advanced Materials Letters","description":"The official open-access journal of IAAM, providing a high-impact platform with no subscription fees for researchers.","linkText":"Learn More","linkUrl":"#"},{"title":"Video Proceedings","description":"An innovative open-access video journal dedicated to documented lectures and visual scientific presentations.","linkText":"Watch Now","linkUrl":"#"}]}

label: Nomination Process & Form
content: {"title":"Nomination Process","description":"IAAM follows a transparent, peer-reviewed nomination process to ensure the highest standards of integrity and excellence.","steps":[{"number":"01","title":"Submission","description":"Submit the nomination dossier including CV, publication list, and impact statement."},{"number":"02","title":"Peer Review","description":"The Scientific Committee evaluates nominations based on originality, impact, and legacy."},{"number":"03","title":"Conferment","description":"Final awardees are announced and celebrated during the EAEMC 2026 gala dinner."}],"formTitle":"Submit Nomination","categories":["Advanced Materials Laureate","Researcher of the Year","Scientist Award","Young Scientist Medal","Innovation Award"]}

label: Distinguished Fellows Directory
content: {"title":"Distinguished Fellows","description":"Celebrating a legacy of scientific leadership and extraordinary vision.","ctaText":"View All Fellows","ctaLink":"#","laureates":[{"image":"/uploads/fellow-awards/rodrigo.jpg","name":"Prof. Rodrigo Martins","title":"FIAAM LAUREATE","description":"Pioneer in paper electronics and transparent semiconductors, shaping the next generation of sustainable technology.","affiliation":"NOVA University Lisbon"},{"image":"/uploads/fellow-awards/federico.jpg","name":"Prof. Federico Rosei","title":"FIAAM LAUREATE","description":"World-renowned for his work in nanomaterials and their applications in solar energy harvesting and storage solutions.","affiliation":"INRS-EMT, Canada"},{"image":"/uploads/fellow-awards/sarah.jpg","name":"Prof. Dr. Sarah Chen","title":"FIAAM FELLOW","description":"Leading innovations in 2D materials for ultra-efficient hydrogen production and zero-emission energy cycles.","affiliation":"ETH Zurich"}]}
